title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.250 - Entry fees — classification
text:
262.250.  Entry fees — classification. — The commission may charge a fee on any entry to be paid at the time of entry.  All animals and articles must be entered in their proper classes and no other.  The director shall determine all questions of classification.  In addition to any exemption in chapter 144, no sales taxes shall be levied and collected on any entry fee or charge authorized in this section.
(RSMo 1939 § 14157, A.L. 1994 S.B. 692) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12477; 1919 § 12046; 1909 § 678
